summary: Comprehensive testing of Asset Management module for TGME ServiceBook. All backend APIs (22 tests) and frontend UI flows passed. Features tested: asset CRUD, QR code generation, accessory linking, filters, search, stats dashboard.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility best practice

action_items: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent components for accessibility (low priority)
critical_code_review_comments: asset_routes.py correctly handles all CRUD operations with proper MongoDB serialization
QR code generation uses qrcode library with base64 encoding - working correctly
Accessory linking via parent_asset_id field works - cascade delete also functional
All data-testid attributes properly placed for testing
Stats endpoint correctly excludes accessories (parent_asset_id filter)
WorkspaceAuthContext.jsx properly implements all asset API methods
seed_data_creation: Test assets created and deleted during testing (cleanup complete)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Asset Management module fully functional. Login with maharathy/Charu@123@, navigate to /workspace/servicebook/assets. Test client ID 69b41f099933a06b72f61bdf (TEST_Acme Corp) available for creating assets.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/workspace/assets - List assets with filters (client_id, type, status, search, parent_only)
GET /api/workspace/assets/{id} - Get single asset with accessories
DELETE /api/workspace/assets/{id} - Delete asset and cascade accessories

features_tested: Navigate to Asset Management via sidebar
Filter dropdowns - client, type, status (all data-testids present)
Create asset form - all fields functional

ACCESSORY_GROUPING.verified: Keyboard/mouse linked to laptop via parent_asset_id

QR_CODE_GENERATION.verified: Base64 PNG QR code with asset tag, serial, brand/model

DATA_ISOLATION.verified: Client filter correctly isolates assets by client_id

playwright_test_results.create_asset: PASSED - asset created with TGME-AST-XXXX tag
